content: Phase 1: POC - All 8 adapters + Claude correlation working
Phase 2: Design guidelines from design_agent applied
Phase 2: Build backend (FastAPI) - adapter modules, sweep service, AI correlate, auth, caching
Phase 2: Build frontend (React) - terminal UI, 2D map + 3D globe, AXE chat widget, spinners
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 (all user stories pass)
Phase 2: Fix correlate timeout (cached <1s) + chat speed (7.6s)
